{"id":"project-LICHEN-fmn1","title":"TUI _disconnect_sync does not close radio socket properly","description":"File: python/src/lichen/tui/app.py
Lines: 382-385

The _disconnect_sync method just sets self._radio = None without actually closing the underlying socket:

    def _disconnect_sync(self) -> None:
        """Synchronous disconnect for shutdown path."""
        # Just drop the reference; the connection will close when the process exits
        self._radio = None

This is called from action_quit() before self.exit(). The socket is left in an indeterminate state, relying on process exit for cleanup. If the app object is reused or exit is delayed, the socket remains open.

Impact: Resource leak, potential socket exhaustion in edge cases, unclean disconnect from simulator.

Fix: Use atexit or run_until_complete to properly await the async close, or restructure to ensure action_quit awaits the close before returning.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:38.118939Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:38.118967Z"}
